name: DropdownButton

parameters.name: Text
parameters.description: Button label text. Ignored when ChildContent is supplied.

parameters.name: ChildContent
parameters.description: Custom button content (overrides Text). The trailing chevron icon is always appended.

parameters.name: MenuContent
parameters.description: The dropdown menu's items, rendered inside a DropdownMenuContent.

parameters.name: Variant
parameters.description: Visual style forwarded to the underlying Button (default Default).

parameters.name: Size
parameters.description: Size forwarded to the underlying Button (default Default).

parameters.name: Disabled
parameters.description: Disables the trigger, removes it from the tab order, and force-closes the menu if it was open.

parameters.name: Class
parameters.description: Additional CSS classes merged onto the underlying Button.

parameters.name: AdditionalAttributes
parameters.description: Unmatched attributes splatted onto the focusable trigger wrapper (author-supplied values win over the built-in tabindex/onkeydown).

examples.title: Variants
examples.code:
<DropdownButton Text="Default">
    <MenuContent>
        <DropdownMenuItem>Option A</DropdownMenuItem>
        <DropdownMenuItem>Option B</DropdownMenuItem>
    </MenuContent>
</DropdownButton>
<DropdownButton Text="Secondary" Variant="Button.ButtonVariant.Secondary">
    <MenuContent>
        <DropdownMenuItem>Option A</DropdownMenuItem>
        <DropdownMenuItem>Option B</DropdownMenuItem>
    </MenuContent>
</DropdownButton>
<DropdownButton Text="Outline" Variant="Button.ButtonVariant.Outline">
    <MenuContent>
        <DropdownMenuItem>Option A</DropdownMenuItem>
        <DropdownMenuItem>Option B</DropdownMenuItem>
    </MenuContent>
</DropdownButton>

examples.title: Sizes
examples.code:
<DropdownButton Text="Small" Size="Button.ButtonSize.Sm">
    <MenuContent>
        <DropdownMenuItem>Option A</DropdownMenuItem>
    </MenuContent>
</DropdownButton>
<DropdownButton Text="Default">
    <MenuContent>
        <DropdownMenuItem>Option A</DropdownMenuItem>
    </MenuContent>
</DropdownButton>
<DropdownButton Text="Large" Size="Button.ButtonSize.Lg">
    <MenuContent>
        <DropdownMenuItem>Option A</DropdownMenuItem>
    </MenuContent>
</DropdownButton>

slots.name: ChildContent
slots.description: Custom button content (overrides Text). The trailing chevron icon is always appended.

slots.name: MenuContent
slots.description: The dropdown menu's items, rendered inside a DropdownMenuContent.

mdSummary:
# DropdownButton

Dropdown Button component.

**Package:** `Lumeo` · **Category:** Utility
**Docs:** https://lumeo.nativ.sh/components/dropdown-button

## Parameters
| Owner | Name | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| DropdownButton | Text | `string?` | `` | Button label text. Ignored when ChildContent is supplied. |
| DropdownButton | ChildContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` | Custom button content (overrides Text). The trailing chevron icon is always appended. |
| DropdownButton | MenuContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` | The dropdown menu's items, rendered inside a DropdownMenuContent. |
| DropdownButton | Variant | `Button.ButtonVariant` | `Button.ButtonVariant.Default` | Visual style forwarded to the underlying Button (default Default). |
| DropdownButton | Size | `Button.ButtonSize` | `Button.ButtonSize.Default` | Size forwarded to the underlying Button (default Default). |
| DropdownButton | Disabled | `bool` | `false` | Disables the trigger, removes it from the tab order, and force-closes the menu if it was open. |
| DropdownButton | Class | `string?` | `` | Additional CSS classes merged onto the underlying Button. |
| DropdownButton | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary\<string, object\>?` | `` | Unmatched attributes splatted onto the focusable trigger wrapper (author-supplied values win over the built-in tabindex/onkeydown). |

## Slots
- `ChildContent` (DropdownButton) — Custom button content (overrides Text). The trailing chevron icon is always appended.
- `MenuContent` (DropdownButton) — The dropdown menu's items, rendered inside a DropdownMenuContent.

## Events
- (none)

## Sub-components
- (none)

## Cascading values it expects
- (none)

## Services it injects
- (none)

## Keyboard
—

## Example
```razor
<DropdownButton />
```

## CSS variables
`--color-foreground`

## Files
